prompt_preview:
You are a medical symptom normalization specialist. Your role is to extract and standardize medical symptoms from patient descriptions.

IMPORTANT: This is for MEDICAL EDUCATION only, not for clinical

primary_symptoms.name: Pain in big toe joint
primary_symptoms.raw_text: My big toe joint became... painful overnight

primary_symptoms.name: Redness of big toe joint
primary_symptoms.raw_text: My big toe joint became extremely red

primary_symptoms.name: Swelling of big toe joint
primary_symptoms.raw_text: My big toe joint became... swollen

secondary_symptoms.name: Diet high in red meat
secondary_symptoms.raw_text: I've been eating a lot of red meat

secondary_symptoms.name: History of similar attack
secondary_symptoms.raw_text: I had a similar attack 6 months ago

ambiguous_signals.reason: Lack of details about the previous attack
ambiguous_signals.clarification_needed: Can you describe what happened during the previous attack?

response.summary: Patient presents with sudden onset of severe pain, redness, and swelling in the big toe joint, possibly related to gout given dietary factors and history of similar attack.
